{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032319240396B16047B7B2F323FCF6"}"},"total":1091},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7510642887578436414","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真的很好看感情线写得很细腻四十章就在一起了从来没看过这么迅速的文呜呜呜。男主一发现自己的感情就表白了，对言真的很耐心很好。篇幅也不长真的juju好看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1748716810,"group_id":"7442615498728033305","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7g0ETEFRw5vr9m7b0C4v/E=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/51a200e778d747d1bc6abd8156a2c294~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789060&x-signature=NajnFAa6KcxZ101Ui%2BCTDTSb%2Fo4%3D","user_id":"695367507382046","user_name":"与明月同照"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"695367507382046","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7442615498728033305","book_info":{"abstract":"徐子言是TWG队伍里一个籍籍无名的青训选手。
　　
　　他技术出色，却因为得罪了人，怎么都通不过入队测试。眼看着其他技术不如自己的队友都被选入二队，被逼上绝路的徐子言动了歪心思。
　　
　　一个月黑风高的夜里，TWG战队队长、联盟人称“大魔王”的谢蔚回到宿舍，发现门口多了一个不知天高地厚的Omega。
　　--
　　
　　谢蔚对这个满脑子歪心思的Omega兴不起任何好感，只当徐子言是个花架子，给人安排了个二队冷板凳的位子便不再管他。
　　
　　离开前，他将徐子言摁在墙角，厉声警告：“那天只是一场意外，在战队里不准装作认识我。”
　　
　　几个月后，比赛后台休息室内，谢队长紧紧搂住Omega的腰不让人离开：“宝贝，你身上没我的味道，我不安心。”

ook_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"19"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032319240396B16047B7B2F323FCF6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读60分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":13,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3578,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":7402},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7542706601492120382","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"徐子言   谢蔚
旁边觥筹交错，人声鼎沸，而他们两两相望，眼眸中只有彼此。
遇见你以前，我的心如无根浮萍，漂泊不定，无处可归。
遇见你以后，我才终于找到了归途。
自此，不再孤独。
好看，其中副CP有一对哥弟恋[笑][雀食神作]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1756178177,"group_id":"7442615498728033305","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"秋去春来，谁怜曲院风荷，韶华白首，不过浮生一阙","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5smEj14t1r/nQmGtT7bTT8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/02c4cdca9b204b9b9ae633f5c00cc6e0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788226&x-signature=7XJES3%2Bl1aBxtHNU1x9e65rH7Ho%3D","user_id":"108893216303","user_name":"风清云染"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"108893216303","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1662543939,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#E1DDFF","can_worn":false,"id":5,"name":"前排催更","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/dda89d247c75fa9dfdf08a80bd508401","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/b9a497dac48a9ee6b81051a70c630d0f"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7442615498728033305","book_info":{"abstract":"徐子言是TWG队伍里一个籍籍无名的青训选手。
